progress_summary: Cut v1.4.3 — extend opchain to Codex, brought forward from the tabled v1.8 roadmap slot. Lockstep-bumped all 18 skills to 1.4.3 + regen'd mcp-catalog; styleguide badge → v1.4.3; added the v1.4.3 changelog hero ('opchain runs on Codex') and demoted v1.4.2 to a rel-card (tab count 6→7); flipped site.feature.codex-install default → true so the /install Codex flow ships; updated the roadmap line + Decision. Homepage pill stays v1.4 (major.minor — patches don't move it). PASS — vitest 345/345, astro check 0 errors/0 warnings, site build 35 pages, worker build clean. Activation is a manual deploy (deploy:staging → eyeball → deploy).
next_actions: Manual deploy to ship v1.4.3: npm run deploy:staging → curl staging /api/health + /mcp → npm run deploy. That lights up the /mcp endpoint and the install flow together.
Optional, post-launch: the platform-neutral marketing copy scrub (homepage hero, compare, glossary, security, uses, skills/[id], Header/SearchPalette).
